race.comment: NORDIC STRIKE (3) won two on end before missing the frame last time over 1200m at Cranbourne, where he overraced on speed. Better suited here and drops back 200m briefly freshened.  In the premier stable and can bounce back. MARTIAL MUSIC (1) hasn't raced since finishing fourth at Caulfield over 1000m five weeks ago. Kept ticking over with a recent trial win at Caulfield Heath. Expected to measure right up in this company with a 4kg claimer engaged. In a top barn and is the threat. DOCUMENTARY (5) resumes and is proven fresh. Jumps from an inside barrier and can make the finish if presented on-song. Stablemate IMPENDING SHADOW (7) resumes and flies fresh. She also has enough ability to consider.
